fullText: Guess what? Chat GPT is going to start using adverts like this, which is particularly funny because based on this clip, >> I kind of think of ads as like a last resort for us for a business model. Um, I would do it if it meant that was the only way to get everybody on the world in the world like access to great services. But if we can find something that doesn't do that, I'd prefer that. >> He has failed at his goal. And he's even previously said that he finds the combination of AI and ads uniquely unsettling. But I also think the last part of the clip and the wording in their announcements is great marketing speak. They say they're doing this for the good of the world so that everyone can get chat GPT and not so that they can get some more money, which they may or not be running out of by the way. And one of the worst parts is this isn't just for the chat GPT free tier, which I think is okay if you have adverts on it. But apparently it's even going to apply to the chat GPT go tier, which is $8 a month, which I absolutely hate. You're already paying. They shouldn't need to inject more adverts into it. The only hope that I have for this news at the moment is that it is little banner ads underneath the actual chat that you're having and it's not injecting adverts into the actual responses that the AI is giving you. But how long is that going to last? Talking of adverts though, subscribe for more great developer content.
